sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83482" key="plano/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλανόδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83482.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">going by by-paths, wandering,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75</biblScope> </bibl> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλᾱ-</foreign>, metri gr.]; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πληνοδία</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
